# Copilot Instructions for Stoffwechsel

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Overview
This is a modern Next.js website for "Stoffwechsel", a fashion store with an elegant and clean design.

## Design System
- **Color Palette:**
  - Background Cream: `#FAF8F5`
  - Foreground Dark: `#3D3226`
  - Earth Dark: `#5C4A3A`
  - Earth Medium: `#8B7355`
  - Earth Light: `#C9B8A3`
  - Sand: `#E8DDD0`
  - Cream: `#F5F0E8`
  - Terracotta (Accent): `#B8815F`
  - Olive: `#8B8674`

- **Design Style:**
  - Modern and clean aesthetic
  - Geometric shapes placed strategically on the sides
  - Angular/edgy forms that complement each other
  - Large, impactful images to make a statement
  - Minimalist approach with focus on visual hierarchy

## Technical Stack
- Next.js 15+ with App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- React 19+
- Turbopack for fast development

## Guidelines
- Follow Next.js best practices for App Router
- Use Tailwind CSS for all styling
- Implement responsive design (mobile-first)
- Optimize images using Next.js Image component
- Keep components modular and reusable
